answers: Succulent care: lots of bright light, infrequent deep watering (every 1-2 weeks), fast-draining soil, and no standing water.
Beginner succulents: echeveria, jade plant, aloe vera, haworthia, sedum. All very forgiving and easy to propagate.
Watering rule: soak the soil completely, then let it dry out fully before watering again. Overwatering kills succulents.
Succulent tips: use terra cotta pots (breathe better), cactus/succulent soil mix, and give them the sunniest window you have.
